zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Pakenham於1459年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Pakenham24歲，母親Margaret Bramshott14歲。他於1499年與Anne Clement在英國英格蘭素福爾可帕克南結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1512年在英國英格蘭肯特書爾斯特享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Pakenham于1459年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John Pakenham24岁，母亲Margaret Bramshott14岁。他于1499年与Anne Clement在英国英格兰素福爾可帕克南结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1512年在英国英格兰肯特書爾斯特享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Pakenham was born in 1459, in Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir John Pakenham, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Bramshott, was 14. He married Anne Clement in 1499, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1512, in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Pakenham est né en 1459, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pakenham, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bramshott, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Anne Clement en 1499, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1512, à Penshurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Pakenham 1459 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Pakenham 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Bramshott 14. Er hat 1499 in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Anne Clement geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1512 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Penshurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Pakenham è nato il nel 1459 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Pakenham, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bramshott, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Anne Clement nel 1499, nel Pakenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1512, nel Penshurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Pakenhamが1459年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Pakenhamは24歳，母Margaret Bramshottは14歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリススフォルクプアケンハムでAnne Clementと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1512年にイギリスイギリスケントペンシュルストで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Pakenham(이)가 1459년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Pakenham(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bramshott(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 팍함에서 Anne Clement(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 펜슈르스트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Pakenham nasceu em 1459, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pakenham, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bramshott, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Clement em 1499, em Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1512, em Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Pakenham родился в 1459 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Pakenham было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bramshott, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Clement в 1499 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1512 г. в местности пеншурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Pakenham nació en 1459, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pakenham, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Bramshott, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Anne Clement en 1499, en Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1512, en Penshurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
